latin: Patriarcha familiae, vir potentissimus, filio suo dixit: 'ei condicionem feram quam recusare non possit.'

glossary.feram: I will bring, I will offer

questions.target: The powerful head of the family
choices: The powerful head of the family

questions.prompt: What does he promise to do?
questions.target: Make an offer that cannot be refused
choices: Make an offer that cannot be refused

translation: The patriarch of the family, a most powerful man, said to his son: 'I will bring him an offer that he cannot refuse.'
